entity.name: Joseph Kato
entity.description: Joseph Kato is the original creator and sole maintainer of Vale, a suite of open-source tools for automated prose linting and documentation quality. Used by Microsoft, GitLab, Docker, and more, Vale has over 1 million downloads and helps documentation teams enforce consistent, inclusive, and high-quality writing at scale.

projects.name: Vale CLI
projects.description: The core command-line interface of the Vale ecosystem, enabling customizable style-based linting for technical documentation, blog posts, and other text formats. Extensively used in CI/CD workflows.

projects.name: Vale Language Server
projects.description: A language server implementation for Vale, allowing seamless editor integration (e.g., VS Code, Neovim). Brings real-time linting to developers and writers in IDEs.

projects.name: Vale GitHub Action
projects.description: GitHub Action for integrating Vale into CI pipelines. Makes it easy to add documentation linting to pull requests, ensuring consistency in collaborative writing workflows.

projects.name: Vale Website
projects.description: The public documentation and marketing website for the Vale ecosystem. Hosts installation guides, style configuration examples, integration docs, and more for both new and advanced users.

projects.name: Vale Packages
projects.description: A collection of curated and community-contributed style packages for Vale. These packages provide reusable rulesets for organizations and open-source communities to enforce grammar, inclusive language, tone, and branding consistency.

channels.description: Preferred platform for one-time and recurring contributions.
Support Vale through Open Collective for transparent funding and expense tracking.

plans.name: Vale Browser Extension Development
plans.description: Funding requested to build a cross-browser extension for real-time text linting with Vale, supporting editing interfaces like GitHub, GitLab, and CMS tools. This will make Vale accessible to non-technical users and documentation writers.
